items.title: Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-orders now live
items.summary:
Update:

  • Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-orders are now live at Amazon on PS5 and Xbox.
  • Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-orders are now live at Walmart on PS5 and Xbox.
  • Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-orders are now live at GameStop on PS5 or Xbox.

Okay here we go! Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-orders are now live. Retailers like Amazon, Walmart, and others are at the ready to take orders on boxed copies and you won’t have to pay until later this year when it launches in November. All digital copies are expected to be live on the PS and Xbox storefronts tonight as well.

GTA 6 pre-order at Amazon on PS5 or Xbox – NOW LIVE

GTA 6 pre-order at Walmart on PS5 or Xbox – NOW LIVE

GTA 6 pre-order at GameStop on PS5 or Xbox – NOW LIVE

items.title: Best Buy’s Tech Fest Prime Day sale knocks up to $650 off all-new 2026 Copilot+ PCs with Snapdragon X2 and Ryzen AI 400 chips
items.summary: Best Buy is running a sale of its own to compete with Amazon’s 2026 Prime Day, having already kicked off its new Tech Fest event with major discounts across PCs, Apple gear, home appliances, and more. The retailer is also offering notable markdowns on Windows laptops and desktops, particularly the new 2026 Copilot+ PC models with savings of up to $650. These are the first deals we’re tracking on many of the new Windows notebooks that debuted earlier this year, sporting next-generation processors and NPUs built for AI tasks. You’ll find offers on models powered by Qualcomm’s latest Snapdragon X2 Plus, AMD’s Ryzen AI 400 series, and Intel’s Core Ultra Series 3 “Panther Lake” processors. We’ve rounded up some of the best options from the sale below, so be sure to check them out before the deals disappear.

Prices have dropped even lower on select models since we last checked in on the sale this past weekend and LG is also seriously sweetening the offers with FREE $250 Visa gift cards you can use just about anywhere you want. Scope out the details below.

items.title: Last chance Apple Prime Day deals from $24: AirPods Pro 3 $70 off, Apple Watch $150 off, MacBooks up to $850 off, more
items.summary: Amazon’s 2026 Prime Day sale still has plenty of deals left in the tank before the whole thing closes down for another year, but some of the best Apple deals are already starting to sell out or jump back up in price. Fortunately, we are still tracking a solid $70 price drop on AirPods Pro 3 to deliver one of the best deals ever, as well as up to $150 off the most affordable and popular Apple Watch Series 11 models. Apple has raised the price on its current generation MacBook lineup substantially (as much as $500) but there are still some models down with Prime Day pricing at as much as much $850 under the price you’ll pay Apple (if you move fast, they are disappearing every minute). All of that and a bunch more awaits below as part of our last minute Apple Prime Day deals collection.

items.title: Amazon’s Prime Day offers up to 53% savings on Govee smart lights, devices, appliances, more – all starting from $16
items.summary: As Amazon Prime Day nears its end, there is still time to jump on up to 53% discounts across Govee’s massive lineup of smart lights, smart devices, kitchen appliances, and so much more. This sale is also the first chance to score the new Govee Matter Lantern Floor Lamp down at $99.99 shipped, matching its price directly from the brand’s website. It’s dropping down from its full price of $130 for the very first time here, giving you $30 in savings on one of the newest floor lamps from the popular brand. Head below to browse the massive list of deals while they are still live.

items.title: Best of 9to5Toys – Prime Day edition deals: The biggest sale of the year ends soon
items.summary:
Good morning and welcome to Best of 9to5Toys Weekly – Prime Day edition. We are touching down a day early this week in celebration of Prime Day 2026. There are loads of amazing prices live right now on everything from AirPods Pro 3 and Apple Watch Series 11, to LEGO, Anker charging gear, smart home products, clothing, and well…just about everything. But much of its starting to jump back up in price or will be very soon, so dive in now while you still can.

Final 24 hours of Amazon’s massive 2026 Prime Day starts now: Apple, Anker, LEGO, Android gear, more

items.title: Score up to 50% Prime Day savings on NOCO’s popular jump starters, battery chargers, more – all from $23
items.summary: As part of Amazon’s soon-to-end Prime Day Sale, you still have time to score up to 50% discounts on NOCO’s popular lineup of car jump starters, diagnostic tools, and even some new smartphone charging stations. Among the bunch, you can find options like the popular NOCO GB40 Boost Plus Jump Starter at $75.96 shipped. This model has been a long-time favorite of mine, and its spent the entirety of 2026 keeping to its $100 full price, getting its first discount of the year during this event. You can bring it home with a $24 markdown here, landing it at the best price we have tracked since Black Friday. Head below to browse the full lineup of the brand’s deals while they last.

We have already started to see pricing on select current-generation Apple gear jump back up in price, but you can still land its latest AirPods Pro down at $70 off.

items.title: Electrified Weekly – Prime Day edition: Score the best prices on power stations, EVs, tools, and more from our favorite brands
items.summary:
Welcome to 9to5Toys Electrified Weekly – the best place to find all of this week’s best deals and new releases to electrify your life and protect Mother Nature. It’s been an exciting week of some of the best deals of the year on greener tech from all our favorite brands – and you’ve still got time to jump on them before they end later tonight! Of course, we’ve got major sales on power stations, like the EcoFlow lineup of tons of extra savings, or the new low prices on Anker SOLIX units. The Lectric Better-than-Prime Sale is offering up to $694 savings on e-bikes, while Segway has dropped prices all across its EV lineup, including continuing the amazing Xyber e-bike + extra battery bundle. From there, we’ve got roundups for our favorite tool brands, like EGO, Greenworks, and Worx – and so much more waiting for you down below! And don’t forget to pop into our Prime Day Green Deals hub over the weekend (which has even more goodies) to see if any of these deals/sales are extended.

Final 24 hours of Amazon’s massive 2026 Prime Day starts now: Apple, Anker, LEGO, Android gear, more
